html:
Exclusive to:  

The Toy Boat can be snagged from Flotsam by using a Fishing Rod. It can be given to the Pig King for two Gold Nuggets. When given a Toy Boat, Wolly will drop two Blue Gems and a Crimson Feather, tell a part of Wolly's Riddle, then fly away.

×2

Trinket 21

Exclusive to:  

In the Shipwrecked DLC, an item with the same appearance can be captured in Trawl Net. Despite having the same appearance and character quotes, they are actually two different items and they cannot be stacked.

In the Hamlet DLC, the Toy Boat can spawn in a Bandit Stash.

×9

×3

×8

Gallery

  • Toy Boat card from Wolly's Riddle.

"sunken_boat_trinket_2"
Exclusive to:
“I ought to measure it to make sure it's to scale.”
–Wilson
“I've put away childish things.”
–Willow
“So Tiny!”
–Wolfgang
“What sort of simple mind would be amused by this?”
–Wendy
“THIS BOAT CONSTRUCTION IS PREPOSTEROUS”
–WX-78
“A lovely, tiny boat.”
–Wickerbottom
“That boat seems a little on the small side.”
–Woodie
“Might be nice in a hot bath...”
–Maxwell
“Appears to be seaworthy, but much too diminutive to be useful.”
–Wagstaff
“A child's löngship.”
–Wigfrid
“Yaaaay!”
–Webber
“Is there a toy surf board?”
–Walani
“I'm afraid I won't fit.”
–Warly
“'Tis a mockery o'th'mighty vessels o'th'sea!”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS A TEENY BOAT”
–Wilba
“Baby floater”
–Wormwood
“I'd like it better if it was a balloon.”
–Wheeler

The '''Toy Boat''' can be snagged from [[Flotsam]] by using a [[Fishing Rod]]. It can be given to the [[Pig King]] for two [[Gold Nugget]]s. When given a Toy Boat, [[Sunken Boat|Wolly]] will drop two [[Gems|Blue Gems]] and a [[Feather|Crimson Feather]], tell a part of [[Wolly's Riddle]], then fly away.

{{Recipe
|item1 = Toy Boat
|gold = yes
|result = Gold Nugget
|resultcount = 2
}}

{{clear}}
==Trinket 21==

In the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, an item with the same appearance can be captured in [[Trawl Net]]. Despite having the same appearance and character quotes, they are actually two different items and they cannot be stacked.

In the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC, the Toy Boat can spawn in a [[Secret Bandit Camp|Bandit Stash]]. 

{{Recipe
|item1 = Toy Boat
|gold = yes
|result = Gold Nugget
|resultcount = 9
}}
{{Recipe
|item = Toy Boat
|tool = Pig Collector
|result = Oinc
|resultcount = 3
|dlc = Hamlet
}}
{{Recipe
|item = Toy Boat
|dubloon = yes
|result = Dubloons
|resultcount = 8
|dlc = Shipwrecked
}}
